name: Lieutenant Kess
portraitPrompt: fantasy character portrait, scout lieutenant on mountain ridge, cloak snapping in wind, distant fortress silhouette, painterly, no text

dialogue.greeting: This is where the war learns to breathe again. Don’t let it.

nodes.text:
Two ways to the fortress:

1) The Narrow Pass — faster, watched by archers.
2) The Goat Path — slower, safer if you can climb.

And there’s a rumor:
A waterfall that hides an old smuggler’s throat into the deep.

Pick your risk.

name: Jan the Porter
portraitPrompt: fantasy character portrait, frightened porter with bundle of keys on belt, fortress kitchens behind, painterly, no text

dialogue.greeting: I haul their barrels. I don’t want their war.

nodes.text:
If you don’t kill me, I’ll tell you three things:

- The quartermaster keeps cold-iron keys.
- The cistern hatch leads to older stone.
- The waterfall cave is real… but it listens.

Will you spare me?

choices.label: Threaten him for the keyring (risk alarm).
